'''hazuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jyutping|jyutping]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jyutping|jyutping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hazuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzikith|hæzikith]] || [[word:hæzikij|hæzikij]] || [[word:hæzikish|hæzikish]] || [[word:hæziki|hæziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazuzukuth|hazuzukuth]] || [[word:hazuzukuj|hazuzukuj]] || [[word:hazuzukush|hazuzukush]] || [[word:hazuzuku|hazuzuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazukuth|hazukuth]] || [[word:hazukuj|hazukuj]] || [[word:hazukush|hazukush]] || [[word:hazuku|hazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazufkufth|hazufkufth]] || [[word:hazufkufj|hazufkufj]] || [[word:hazufkufsh|hazufkufsh]] || [[word:hazufkuf|hazufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazukuthu|hazukuthu]] || [[word:hazukuju|hazukuju]] || [[word:hazukushu|hazukushu]] || [[word:hazukuku|hazukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazukuth|hazukuth]] || [[word:hazukuj|hazukuj]] || [[word:hazukush|hazukush]] || [[word:hazuku|hazuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazukuthul|hazukuthul]] || [[word:hazukujul|hazukujul]] || [[word:hazukushul|hazukushul]] || [[word:hazukukul|hazukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazukuuthuthu|hazukuuthuthu]] || [[word:hazukuujuju|hazukuujuju]] || [[word:hazukuushushu|hazukuushushu]] || [[word:hazukuuku|hazukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazukuthun|hazukuthun]] || [[word:hazukujun|hazukujun]] || [[word:hazukushun|hazukushun]] || [[word:hazukukun|hazukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazukuthuoro|hazukuthuoro]] || [[word:hazukujuoro|hazukujuoro]] || [[word:hazukushuoro|hazukushuoro]] || [[word:hazukukuoro|hazukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
